chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-514 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Sharyar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General along with Shajan Napar Deputy Manager Legal Affairs State Life Insurance Sukkur Zone on behalf of respondent No.6..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The statement has been filed on behalf of respondent No.6, which is taken on record and copy thereof has been provided to the counsel or the petitioner. The Counsel for petitioner stated that he could not obtain succession and he will file proper application before respondent No.6 for deciding his final amount which is lying in the account of State Life Insurance Sukkur and raised no objection for disposal of instant petition on the ground that he will approach before proper forum for succession certificate. Under the circumstances, instant petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
